Remove from List
will be removed from your eFed page.
The episode stays on the Hub — it won't disappear for other users. You can re-add it to your eFed at any time by submitting the link again.
Delete from Hub
You are about to permanently delete from the entire EFED Streaming Hub.
This removes the video for everyone — it will no longer appear anywhere on the Hub. The + button becomes active again so it can be re-submitted in the future. This does not delete the video from YouTube.

FAQ
What is the EFED Streaming Hub?
A Netflix-style platform for CAW eFed wrestling content — a central home base where fans and creators discover, watch, and share shows from various promotions.
Is it free to use?
Yes — completely free. No subscriptions, no ads, no paywalls. Sign up with an invite code and you're in.
Can anyone post videos?
Any registered member can submit videos. All submissions are reviewed to ensure they're genuine eFed wrestling content before going live.
Is there a limit to how many videos I can post?
No hard limit — but only real eFed show content. Spam or irrelevant submissions may result in account review.
Does watching here count toward YouTube views?
Yes! Videos use the official YouTube embed player, so every view on the Hub counts toward the creator's YouTube view count.
How do I get an invite code?
Each member receives invite codes when they join. You can also request one from the sign-in page.
How do I report a video or comment?
On any video page tap the 3-dot menu to report. For comments, use the flag icon. All reports go to the admin.
Is my account information private?
Yes. Your email and password are never publicly visible. Only your display name and Hub activity are visible to other members.

Tap the red + button anywhere on the Hub to submit your first episode.
Claim this eFed
What claiming does
✓ Links this eFed page to your account
✓ Lets you edit your logo, banner & bio
✓ Lets you submit & manage episodes
✓ Your episodes & roster stats become active
✓ You can set your League Status & open hiring for roster members
Verify ownership
⚠️ Only claim an eFed that belongs to you. False claims will result in your account being reviewed and the claim reversed.

Add Title

Preview — use the Position Image tool to align your belt. All championships display at the same size (112×64px).
Award Trophy
How it works
Use this when a contender wins a title — as a new champion, not as a defending champion. The trophy gets sent to their Trophy Case on their profile and stays there as a verified win. For a current reign, set the year to Present. For a past reign, enter the year the title was originally won.
Position Image
White outline = belt plate guide · Align your belt to match · All championships display at the same size
